summary: Phase F Deprecation Cleanup Validation - All 16 tests PASSED. The cleanup was successful: db_compat.py removed, /stages routes return 404, deprecated collections dropped, project_timeline_id field removed from all documents.
critical_code_review_comments: Phase F cleanup executed correctly - all deprecated artifacts removed
db_compat.py module deleted - all operations now use direct db.* calls
project_timeline_id field successfully $unset from all documents
All API responses use timeline_id exclusively - no project_timeline_id anywhere
No ObjectId serialization errors in any endpoint
No _id fields leaked in any JSON response
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data - project_id: demo_proj_001, timeline_id: timeline_demo_001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase F deprecation cleanup validation complete. All 16 tests passed: health check, auth login, projects list, units from canonical collection, /stages returns 404 (removed), /steps works, project-timeline has timeline_id (no project_timeline_id), timeline steps have timeline_id, timeline/full endpoint, workflow/full endpoint, clients list, documents list, agent dashboard, agent stats, no ObjectId errors, no _id leaks. The data model normalization sprint is complete - all deprecated artifacts have been removed.
